---
title: 'The Kai Lab'
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## [ABOUT ME](./about_me/about_me.html) | [CV](about_me/Kristopher_Kai_Pauole_Resume.pdf) | [BIOL 3100 - Final Project](./final_project/final_project.html)##

# K. Kai Pauole: Microbiology major #
Born and raised in Utah, I enjoy learning about the unseen world of microbes, and spending
time with my family.

```{r, out.width="60%", echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics('C:/Users/kaipa/Downloads/Kaipauole.github.io/IMG_8607.jpg')

```

Welcome to my website. 

Any questions? Email kaipauole@gmail.com
